title: spermacoce phyteumoides var. phyteumoides
intro: Spermacoce phyteumoides var. phyteumoides, also known as 'Kevat,' is a plant species within the Rubiaceae family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain alkaloids with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential candidate for treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Spermacoce phyteumoides var. phyteumoides include its use in managing fever, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from respiratory issues. Spermacoce phyteumoides var. phyteumoides is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or decoction, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
